CONTENT.Career: On 12 September 2018, Djakpa joined Regionalliga Südwest side Hessen Dreieich.
CONTENT.External links: Constant Djakpa at fussballdaten.de (in German)Constant Djakpa at National-Football-Teams.comConstant Djakpa at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: Djakpa played for the national Olympic team and for the Ivory Coast U21. He represented his country at the 2008 Toulon Tournament, scoring two goals, one a penalty against the United States, and one against Chile.Represented the team at 2014 World Cup.

SUMMARY: Tohouri Zahoui Constant Djakpa (born 17 October 1986) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a left back.
